children.name:
AssertionError: Mensagem de erro visível no primeiro carregamento
assert not True
 +  where True = _has_visible_error(<Page url='https://townsq.octadesk.com/login'>)

AssertionError: assert ('https://townsq.octadesk.com/login' != 'https://townsq.octadesk.com/login' or 0 > 0)
 +  where 'https://townsq.octadesk.com/login' = <Page url='https://townsq.octadesk.com/login'>.url
 +  and   0 = count()
 +    where count = <Locator frame=<Frame name= url='https://townsq.octadesk.com/login'> selector='text=/dashboard|home|bem-vindo/i'>.count
 +      where <Locator frame=<Frame name= url='https://townsq.octadesk.com/login'> selector='text=/dashboard|home|bem-vindo/i'> = locator('text=/dashboard|home|bem-vindo/i')
 +        where locator = <Page url='https://townsq.octadesk.com/login'>.locator

AssertionError: assert (False or False)
 +  where False = is_error_visible()
 +    where is_error_visible = <pages.login_page.LoginPage object at 0x0000016862229950>.is_error_visible
 +  and   False = _has_visible_error(<Page url='https://townsq.octadesk.com/login'>)
